conclusion: mRNA, DNA methylation and RPPA were preprocessed separately inside each CV fold and then concatenated into one integrated feature matrix.
Median imputation, scaling and top-variable filtering were fitted only on the training fold, then applied to the held-out fold.
Early-fusion Elastic Net achieved ROC-AUC = 0.989, balanced accuracy = 0.956, and macro-F1 = 0.959.
When compared with available single-omics baselines, the top ROC-AUC model was DNA methylation + Random Forest with ROC-AUC = 0.998.
The next step is DIABLO, which performs supervised multi-block integration and feature selection instead of simple concatenation.
